notes.sg-type-2-diabete-2-diabete: Too generic, '2 diabete' is not a standard term.
notes.sg-type-2-diabete-type-2-diabete-mellitu: Relabeled to standard 'type 2 diabetes mellitus'. Merged other management/treatment topics into this.
notes.sg-type-2-diabete-impaired-glucose-toler: This is a precursor to type 2 diabetes, but not type 2 diabetes itself. Keep as a related concept.
